EEG Foundation Models: Progresses, Benchmarking, and Open Problems
EEG-to-Voice Decoding of Spoken and Imagined speech Using Non-Invasive EEG
Leveraging Foundational Models and Simple Fusion for Multi-modal Physiological Signal Analysis
Systematic review of self-supervised foundation models for brain network representation using electroencephalography
Multi-decoder Neural Tracking Method for Accurately Predicting Speech Intelligibility
Brain4FMs: A Benchmark of Foundation Models for Electrical Brain Signal
ASPEN: Spectral-Temporal Fusion for Cross-Subject Brain Decoding
BrainRVQ: A High-Fidelity EEG Foundation Model via Dual-Domain Residual Quantization and Hierarchical Autoregression
DeeperBrain: A Neuro-Grounded EEG Foundation Model Towards Universal BCI
Structured Prototype-Guided Adaptation for EEG Foundation Models
ZUNA: Flexible EEG Superresolution with Position-Aware Diffusion Autoencoders
HCFT: Hierarchical Convolutional Fusion Transformer for EEG Decoding
Online decoding of rat self-paced locomotion speed from EEG using recurrent neural networks
